summary: Results-driven Full Stack Engineer with 2+ years of experience in developing and optimizing scalable web applications using Laravel, Node.js, and Angular. Proven expertise in REST API development, API Security, and query optimization. Strong background in designing, implementing, and maintaining systems and applications, accelerating API and database performance by up to 50% and reducing search latency by 70% for applications serving over 30 million users. Expert in leveraging AI tools like Amazon Kiro, Antigravity, and GitHub Copilot for rapid development, workflow automation, and research.

bullets: Designed and launched high-throughput RESTful APIs for a platform with 30M+ users, ensuring high availability and responsiveness.
Built a high-performance analytics microservice in Node.js and ClickHouse, reducing monolithic API load by 50% and improving database response speeds by 30%.
Optimized database queries and system performance by 50% through strategic Eager Loading and Redis caching.
Configured Elasticsearch clusters, slashing search latency by 70% and enhancing user experience on large queries.
Led the full-cycle development of a Government Portal (Laravel/PHP/JS), boosting system efficiency by 20% and serving 50k+ active users.
Spearheaded a CakePHP 3 to 5 migration, resulting in a 40% load speed improvement, a 30% reduction in production bugs, and 8+ saved engineering hours weekly.
Created a multilingual real-time data collection tool used by 10,000+ users across 4 geographies, reliably handling 100k+ entries.
Integrated AG Grid and HighCharts to build interactive data visualizations, boosting stakeholder insights by 30%.
Authored secure RESTful APIs for app-backend synchronization, improving mobile performance by 20% and reducing server bandwidth consumption by 15%.

projects.name: Online Code Compiler
projects.tech_stack: React.js, Node.js, Express, Docker, Socket.IO, Ace Editor
projects.description: Architected a full-stack online code compiler with real-time feedback using React.js and Socket.IO, utilizing Docker to create secure, isolated execution environments.

projects.name: Unstop Bridge — College TPO Portal
projects.description: Constructed a scalable TPO portal in Laravel and AngularJS to manage 2.5M+ student records, enforcing role-based access control and automating email workflows.

projects.name: Sorting Visualizer
projects.description: Created an interactive sorting visualizer using vanilla JavaScript to demonstrate core DSA concepts by dynamically manipulating the DOM.
